_README: OPT-IN harness hooks for antigravity-app. NOT active by default (it would widen permissions and add a Stop hook). To enable: merge the 'hooks' and 'permissions' blocks below into .claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.local.json) yourself, so you consciously approve the permission widening. See HARNESS.md § 'Activar los hooks (opcional)'.
_design_note: On a large polyglot repo, the Stop hook runs only the FAST structural gate (init.sh), non-blocking/informative — NOT the full test suite. Full backend tests run via RUN_TESTS=1 or the reviewer/CI per OpenSpec change.

hooks.command: bash init.sh > /tmp/harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] init.sh OK' || (echo '[harness] init.sh reported issues — see /tmp/harness_init.log' && tail -20 /tmp/harness_init.log)
hooks.description: Before ending a session, run the harness structural gate (non-blocking, informative).
